title: ProjectCompact
description: A *project* represents a prioritized list of tasks in Asana or a board with columns of tasks represented as cards. It exists in a single workspace or organization and is accessible to a subset of users in that workspace or organization, depending on its permissions.

gid.description: Globally unique identifier of the resource, as a string.

resource_type.description: The base type of this resource.

name.description: Name of the project. This is generally a short sentence fragment that fits on a line in the UI for maximum readability. However, it can be longer.
